detail.instructions: In src/application.rs add UserId, NewUser, and RepositoryError. Define UserRepository: Send + Sync with methods returning impl Future + Send for email_exists and save, keeping repository details out of domain types.
detail.starterCode: // TODO: add async UserRepository operations here.

files.content:
pub mod application;
pub mod domain;
// TODO: add async UserRepository operations here.

hints.body: Persistence operations are asynchronous, but a public trait should state the Send bound of each returned future.
Use return-position impl Future<Output = Result<...>> + Send in the trait.
Concrete implementations can still use async fn.

detail.completionExplanation: The application owns an async persistence contract whose returned futures are explicitly safe to move between runtime worker threads.
